item.title: Azure
item.description: Networking Azure Virtual Networks (VNets) Azure Virtual Network Gateways Azure Transit Options Management Azure Resource Hierarchy

item.title: Azure Resource Hierarchy
item.description: Overview AD Tenant Top level organization Dedicated instance of Azure AD Subscription Billing container for resources Resources isolated between subscriptions Resource Group Container for related resources Common management Example

item.title: Azure Transit Options
item.description: ExpressRoute Edge Router Hair-pinning via EpressRoute Edge Router Common solution—many limitations Network Virtual Appliance (NVA) NVA (e.g. firewall) deployed in VNets and used as transit solution Not scalable—requires manual work VNet Peering Microsoft preferred option Not-transitive—full mesh required for any-to-any communication Management overhead Azure Virtual WAN Microsoft’s solution for limitations of other options Drawbacks: Not multi-cloud friendly Must buy all features Hub doesn’t support third-party devices Limited visibility and troubleshooting No control over routing policy 200 BGP route limit from Azure to on-prem

item.title: Azure Virtual Network Gateways
item.description: VPN Gateway Connect on-prem to VNet via public internet Must be deployed in a Gateway Subnet Express Route Gateway Dedicated connection to VNet—private leased line

item.title: Azure Virtual Networks (VNets)
item.description: Overview Virtual Networks, AKA VNets Network Security Groups—implement firewall capabilities Instances with public IPs can automatically communicate with the internet—no need for e.

item.title: Aviatrix Certified Engineer Associate
item.description: Exam Content As-A-Service Models AWS Networking AWS Organization Hierarchy AWS VPCs Azure Networking Azure Resource Hierarchy Azure Virtual Networks (VNets) Azure Virtual Network Gateways Azure Transit Options GCP Networking GCP VPCs GCP Cloud Interconnect Oracle Cloud Infrastructure OCI Resource Hierarchy OCI Virtual Cloud Networks (VCNs) Aviatrix Aviatrix features Aviatrix Multi-Cloud Network Architecture (MCNA) Cloud Transit Solutions
